rationale: Educ. Code §11.063 governs school district trustee employment eligibility. It is wholly unrelated to the homestead exemption amount in Tax Code §11.13(b). No conflict exists.
quote: A trustee of an independent school district may not accept employment with that school district until the first anniversary of the date the trustee's membership on the board ends.
_note: Rule text concerns trustee employment restrictions, not property tax exemptions. No overlap with proposed change.
